method.name: version_major
method.description: Major version component of the library SemVer. Defined by the build system; defaults to 0 if not set.

method.name: version_minor
method.description: Minor version component of the library SemVer. Defined by the build system; defaults to 0 if not set.

method.name: version_patch
method.description: Patch version component of the library SemVer. Defined by the build system; defaults to 0 if not set.
